channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Following recent resurfacing works, the previous tarmac edge/lip preventing water runoff onto our driveway has been removed. Surface water now flows directly onto private property., 20th March
item.description:
Outside at the top of our drive (our house is called “postings”

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: No rain in 24 hours - water has increased or remained the same

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 20th March
item.description:
I was walking along Montpellier Terrace yesterday afternoon and noticed a large pool of rainwater standing over a road gulley where Montpellier Grove intersects it. This is obviously due to it needing a visit by the gulley cleansing crew as a priority if you could arrange this please.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No road marking in right-hand lane, 20th March
item.description:
The right hand lane approaching the roundabout does not have any road markings. It is unclear which lanes to use on the roundabout. Drivers using the right hand lane to travel onto Grovefield Way frequently cut up the drivers using the left hand lane as the road markings suggest. The road sign prior to the road markings is incorrect as it is missing the Park and Ride carpark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Smashed glass Over pavement and entrance to garden, 20th March
item.description:
House next to 36 orchard avenue Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Orchard Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: IRREGULAR POTHOLE NEXT TO CROSSING ENIYGJ CATCH FOOT, BIKE TIRE/Wheel, 20th March
item.description:
Outside cafe on Suffolk road, next to crossing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Suffolk Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th March
item.description:
ENWD 15db Pothole CW 900x600x100mm Road closure with 15db (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th March
item.description:
Potholes CW, patch required 2000x900x40mm Road closure X 3 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken pothole near 78 Gretton Road Winchcombe, 20th March
item.description:
One of two sunken manholes outside 78/80 Gretton Road Winchcombe. Note this was repaired recently but new tarmac has sunk through compaction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of rubbish dumped on top of hedge, 20th March
item.description:
Possibly thrown over the fence from the house behind. It's the first thing you see as you drive into the estate. Not everyone wants to live in a tip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Fulbrook Close, Springbank, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic calming site 2 x large deep potholes dangerous and cannot be avoided, 20th March
item.description:
Traffic calming site area 2 x large deep potholes dangerous and cannot be avoided
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road destroyed and almost impassable, 20th March
item.description:
Near Whalley farm, 200 yds from other major potholes. I grounded my car badly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire road effectively destroyed, 20th March
item.description:
Top of Agg's hill near Whaley farm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold

item.title: 6cm pothole, 20th March

Lower Aggs hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aggs Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: Pedestrian button kept deactivating, 20th March
item.description:
The pedestrian crossing button Old Gloucester Road side next to the pink digger place kept turning off after I pressed it. Happened 3 times during one cycle of the lights. Then I gave up and crossed without. Dangerous for kids and elderlu
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 20th March
item.description:
please make safe by barriering off footway
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 20th March
item.description:
Customer has damaged their vehicle
Report on FixMyStreet
